👥 {% if project.team_names|length == 1 %}Team: {{ project.team_names[0] }}{% else %}Teams ({{ project.team_names|length }}): {%- for team in project.team_names %} {{ team }}{%- if not loop.last %},{% endif %}{%- endfor %} {% endif %}
{% endif %}

Sessions ({{ project.sessions|length }}) {{ render_session_nav(project.sessions, "expandable", project.name + "/") }}
{% endif %}
{% endmacro %} {# Recursive tree rendering for --expand-paths (Obsidian mode): nested
    /
  • mirroring the projected folder hierarchy with project cards as leaves. #} {% macro render_project_tree(node) %}
      {%- set subdirs = [] -%} {%- for key in node.keys()|sort -%} {%- if key != '_projects' -%} {%- set _ = subdirs.append(key) -%} {%- endif -%} {%- endfor -%} {% for dirname in subdirs %}
    • {{ dirname }}/ {{ render_project_tree(node[dirname]) }}
      • {% endfor %} {% for project in node.get('_projects', []) %}
    • {{ render_project_card(project) }}
      • {% endfor %}
    {% endmacro %}
    {% if project_tree %} {{ render_project_tree(project_tree) }} {% else %} {% for project in projects %} {{ render_project_card(project) }} {% endfor %} {% endif %}
